title: Iron Chests (with Netherite Chest)
description: A fork of Iron Chest for 1.12 adding a Netherite Chest
body:
This is a fork of the 1.12.2 version of [Iron Chests](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iron-chests) that adds a Netherite Chest that holds 192 stacks, which is almost double the capacity of the Diamond, Crystal, and Obsidian Chests. Those three chests can be upgraded to a Netherite Chest. Also includes Shulker Boxes.
![A Netherite Chest against a wall of Stone blocks, flanked to the left by a Diamond Chest and to the right by an Iron Chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80566a361f35401a1b9063d51731debf934e0a90.png)
![A 8x24 container GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b51bec5b867549b34f72ace5496f4e26b7f3d512.png)
![Netherite variations of every Shulker Box color](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d3989fdf78a06d4530309bb2db09668744884ab.png)

**Additional features**
- Optional Shulker recipe rebalance
- Optional colored menus based on material

This mod is useable without a backport mod like [Future MC](https://modrinth.com/mod/future-mc), however, the chest will be unobtainable in survival. Any mod's Netherite should be usable in crafting recipes as long as it has the proper OreDict tags.

Chest item fire immunity code is taken from [Unseen's Nether Backport](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/unseens-nether-backport/files/6507374).
